These BLLQ Anti-Slip Ear Hooks hold your Air Pods securely and prevents it from falling out. Great for running, jogging, cycling, gym and other fitness activities!
Fit &Comfortable
Ear Hooks are made from High Quality Hybrid Thermoplastic polyurethane(TPU) to ensure that they keep their shape perfectly fit for your ear and Air Pods, they are very useful to prevent earbuds falling out and very comfortable for use.

title: USB C Hub, Baseus 6-in-1 Portable USB C Adapter for iPad Pro, Upgrade Type C Dongle to 4K HDMI, USB 3.0, SD/Micro SD Card Reader, 3.5mm Earphone Jack, Type C PD Charger, Independent Switch
description:
It easily extends the USB-C port of your laptop to 4K HDMI, 2 USB 3.0 Port, TF Card Reader, fast USB-C PD charging port and 3.5mm Headphone Jack. Plug & Play, with no additional drivers or installation necessary.
Features:
Turns a single USB-C connection into 6 ports (3.5mm Audio Jack, 2 USB 3.0, Micro SD, USB-C, HDMI) Take full advantage of iPadOS with the hub that supports both USB-C and USB-A flash/hard storage drives. Connect to USB-A peripherals via high speed USB 3.1 Gen 1 capable of 5Gb/s transfer speed. Use hub and charge iPad Pro at the same time! Also supports USB-C data. Simply connect with the HDMI port, mirrors your laptop's display (supports 4K at 30Hz ) on any HDMI-enabled device. Dual USB 3.0 ports, transmission rate up to 5Gbps, can transfer a high-definition movie in seconds. 3.5mm Audio and Mic 2 in 1 Port makes listening, talking, or recording a breeze. Built in TF slot for easy access to files from universal Micro SD Memory Card(SDXC: with high storage capacity up to 2TB)
Specification:
Material: Aluminum alloy Colour: Deep gray Input:Dual Type-C  Output: USB3.0*2+HDMI*1+PD*1+3.5mm*1+TF*1 USB3.0 transmission speed: 5Gbps HDMI Resolution: 4K@30Hz  PD input power: 100W Max.  TF Card: Supports data retrieval from 2TB Memory Card  3.5mm Audio Frequency Port: Port supports standard US headphone sets Size: 83*36*19mm Weight: 65g
Package List:
1* USB C Hub Adapter 1* User Manual
features: Creative Mobile Hub - The Newest Version 6-in-1 USB-C Hub instantly turns your iPad Pro and laptop USB-C port to a 4K HDMI port, 2 USB 3.0 Ports, a USB C charging port with power delivery, 3.5mm Audio/mic 2-in-1 jack (CTIA) and a TF card reader. Plug & Play, with no additional drivers or installation necessary. (NOTE: Only iPad Pro of iOS 13 or above is supported.)

Fast Charge & Data Transfer - The USB-C PD charging port supports pass-through charging of up to 60W, quickly charges iPad Pro while using the other ports, and can connect USB C flash drive for data transfer. USB 3.0 supports transfer speeds up to 5Gbps, fast enough to transfer and share images, files, and videos in seconds.

Crystal Clear 4K Resolution - Mirror or extend your screen with the USB C adapter’s HDMI port and directly stream 4K 3840*2160 @ 30Hz or Full HD 1080p video to HDTV, monitors, or projectors for a cinema-like visual feast. (Tips: Video output for 2018 iPad Pro is 2K@60HZ resolution). And the 3.5mm headphones Jack ensures you talk and listen to music at the same time, keep your focus on call or music.

Pad/Laptop Matching Design - Align the L-shaped holder against the corner of your pad or other USB-C devices, Baseus USB C hub can be securely attached. It is recommended not to wear a protective cover or other accessories that affect the thickness of the device. (such as magic keyboard)

Universal Compatibility Compatible with new iPad Pro 2020/2019/2018, MacBook Pro, MacBook Air 2019/2018, MacBook, Google Chromebook, Dell XPS 13 15, Lenovo Yoga 900, HP Spectre notebook, Surface Book 2, Google Pixel 3 XL/3, Samsung Galaxy Note 10/Note 9/S9/S8/Note 8/, Huawei Mate 30/20/M10/P30/P20, and more USB-C laptop/smartphone.

reviews.title: Don’t buy this knock off, get the real deal
reviews.text: This is the knock-off brand. The real version of this has an SD & micro SD card slot. This version also stopped working for me in under a month. I first noticed it wouldn’t regularly connect to my monitor via the HDMI port, then it began failing to connect all together. The power pass through on this is awful, charging takes forever, but it does with apples dongles also so whatever. Get the real deal & save 50 bucks

reviews.title: I wanted to love this,
reviews.text: I got this for my new iPad. It’s supposed to let you use wired headphones, SIM cards, and even hdmi.  And it does.  It’s a bit cumbersome to use but it does sit on the corner of my iPad even with the iPad cover on.  The big issue i have with it is that it does get hot, VERY HOT, while you’re using it for a longer period of time.  I don’t use it often due to that but i got it at a good price so I’ll keep it.

reviews.title: So far it works as advertised!  Gets alarmingly HOT.. concerned about longevity..
reviews.text:
update::: I've been having issues with connecting this hub to a capture device. it will constantly disconnect and reconnect. I purchased an hdmi splitter that has it's own power source (micro usb) and I connect it with the ipad and the capture device. It's like a middle man... and now the this hub stops disconnecting and reconnecting. It's very odd. Also, connecting power via the USB C port, on the hub, does not help. It's also not a heat issue because I bought a mini fan to blow on it and it's never hot. However, it doesn't disconnect and reconnect when directly connected to a monitor/tv.. it works fine then.

in addition to that issue, I had to get a replacement and noticed that both hubs displayed different color profiles. Using the same monitor, cables, ipad, etc. One was sort of washed out and one was very saturated. Also one wouldn't display 4k (only 2k) and the other one would display 4k, 2k, 1080p, etc. Not really sure why there would be so much variance with the same product.. I guess QC issues?

-----------------------------------

This is the "UPGRADED" version.

So far it works as advertised! Gets alarmingly HOT.. concerned about longevity of the hub itself and concerned about potential damage this could do to my iPad...

This product advertises "Heat vents" but they're just cutouts for the ipad's speakers.. it doesn't actually vent the inside of the hub. This seems deceptive.

I've tried those $20-30 cheap usb c to hdmi + charging port options and they all didn't work properly... mostly they wouldn't actually charge the ipad while outputting the HDMI signal.
This device actually DOES charge while outputting the HDMI signal properly.. which is great.
The audio port works fine, but I have not used the USB ports as I don't really have any use for them at the moment. I mostly needed hdmi output and a charging port that actually charged while hdmi was being used.

I love how the company included 3 different sized spacers to accommodate for ipad's with cases.

The switch to disable the hub is a nice feature. BUT I wish you could disable the charging while still being able to use the HDMI out... so if this switch instead only disabled the charging capabilities but still retained the ability to output video/audio via the HDMI output, that would be, imo, better. Then when the ipad's own battery gets low.. I could flip the switch and allow the hub to start charging. Obviously I can just unplug the USB C charging cable from the hub, but it would be a QoL feature to not have to do that.

I like how it has a long-ish cable instead of just having the usb port extend out of the actual hub body.. this makes it much more versatile, imo.

My biggest concern is how long this product will last due to how HOT it gets while using the HDMI out and charging the ipad at the same time. This is the only time the hub gets alarmingly HOT.. when one is using the HDMI out AND charging at the same time. One could argue that because it's so hot to the touch, that means the passive cooling, inside the hub, is doing its job.. but I don't know if that's actually the case w/o seeing the internals and seeing what kind of heatsinks or w/e are being used. All I know is that this hub gets VERY VERY HOT and devices that overheat tend to stop working sooner than later.

Overall I think this is one of the better options available for 30-50$. The versatility of attaching to the ipad or have it hanging is a huge plus for me.

reviews.title: Convenient & Useful iPad adapter
reviews.text:
So far the only bummer is it’s not really screen protector friendly. I used the thinnest insert because without one it won’t stay in place.

It’s a bit too snug to put on an iPad 11 with a screen protector. The edge of the protector kinda bubbles up. I’ll have to try a few thin cases and not use the inserts to this adapter. That would be more beneficial anyways.

One thing I did notice about the charging port is it’s a bit loose. So you may need to get new cables or try different brands. I have several brands/styles and some do better than others. The Apple cables seem to fit fairly snug though.

Other than that it works as stated. I do like it and it’s more low profile compared to others. All of the ports work especially for charging multiple devices. I use 30w+ for my iPad because I tend to use adapters often. 30w brick & adapter loaded still charged iPad under use.

The adapter looks nice as well. A bit thick but not to the point it’s an issue using it. I have the model with the on/off switch. That’s convenient while otg, in case you need to cut power from the adapter to save the battery from draining.

The adapter doesn’t seem to take a ton of power but if you don’t need it on while away from a power source I’d say just flip it off.

Overall I like this adapter it’s nice & convenient. Like I said my biggest gripe was not really screen protector friendly (iPad w/out a case only screen protector) but it’s not a deal breaker. I’d recommend trying this out!

reviews.title: Very happy
reviews.text: I really like this headset.  I love the charging station as I often woukd forget to charge my last headset that was charged with usb cable.  My only issue with the headset is that the headband is not adjustable and I have a smaller head so the support bar sits a little low.  Very good connection and stays connected if I move around the house.

reviews.title: It Won't Charge
reviews.text: It worked wonderfully for a couple months and now it won't charge. I have switched outlets thinking it was my outlet. I also make sureits lined up in charging base. I loved it until it stopped working. Its a little pricey to only get 2 month use.

reviews.title: Comfortable for truckers and the office.
reviews.text:
I am a dispatcher and I have to wear a headset 8hrs a day. I can stand this one for about 6 hrs. before I need to switch ears. That is better than most headsets I have used. My office orders $300 headsets and this one can throw down with the best of them. The noise cancelation is excellent and the calls sound loud and clear. The Bluetooth connection last the entire 8+ hour shift. Once paired it connects seamlessly when I set up for my day.

Before you spend hundreds of dollars on a headset, give this one a chance. I am glad I did.

I hope this helps. :-)

title: Skullcandy Grind True Wireless In-Ear Bluetooth Earbuds Compatible with iPhone and Android / Charging Case and Microphone / Great for Gym, Sports, and Gaming, IP55 Water Dust Resistant - Grey/Blue
description: Meet the aptly named true wireless earbud for every part of your daily grind. Say hello to Grind™. Thanks to premium sound, hands-free voice control and a water/sweat-resistant build, these are truly your everyday, do-it-all earbuds. Features Skull-iQ Smart Voice Control technology to control audio, calls, Spotify Tap, and many other features hands-free (Compatible with smartphone devices on Android 10 or newer, and iOS 12 or newer)
features: Note : If the size of the earbud tips does not match the size of your ear canals or the headset is not worn properly in your ears, you may not obtain the correct sound qualities or call performance. Change the earbud tips to ones that fit more snugly in your ear

Supreme Sound - Relax, workout or run listening to your favorite tunes with crystal clear audio, gnarly bass and you'll be listening for up to 40 hours on a single charge. The case holds 31 hours, the buds hold 9 hours of battery
Skull-iQ Technology - Share your tunes with a friend in real time, activate your assistant, customize your earbud controls and trigger your phone camera to take the perfect selfie

Skull-iQ also offers complete hands free, meaning you never need to take off your gloves or let go of the handlebar. Play, pause, adjust volume, take calls, skip tracks, launch Spotify and activate Stay-Aware Mode, all without ever touching your device
Never lost with Tile - With Tile technology, Skullcandy tech makes it super easy to track down either earbud and keep your gadgets safe! Download the Tile app and follow the instructions to activate
Buy With Confidence - 1 Year warranty included with the Grind Fuel, whether you're an adult or child be sure to wear your earbuds in full confidence

reviews.title: Refurb- came coated with previous owner's ear wax - Yuck !  UPDATE !
reviews.text:
non hygenic refurb process disappoints- didn't try the super gross earbuds

UPDATE - I spent the extra $20 for a new set. these have issues. the earbuds turn on by themselves in the case and:
1.) hijack the phone connection
2.) use up all the battery, then charge up, and then run down the battery...so when you go to use the earbuds, the batteries are drained in earbuds and the case

other reviewers write of similar problem

skullcandy chat says they think the case needs to be replaced- I can send them in and wait a few weeks for their warranty repair. but it appears these issues are in the design

or return to amazon within the return period.

yes, that.

reviews.title: Nice sound
reviews.text: These have become my favorite earbuds love the voice activated commands

reviews.title: Stopped Charging
reviews.text: Stopped charging after a month. Return window just expired a few days ago. Now I have to deal with returning through Skullcandy

reviews.title: Comfort!
reviews.text: So the sound quality is good, battery life is good but for me the most important point is they are comfortable. I've been through a LOT of ear buds in search of something that I can wear for several hours without my ears starting to hurt and these are them! Charging case doesn't feel very substantial, but since I don't need to charge them every couple of hours I can live with it.

reviews.title: Interesting app
reviews.text: I've been using these earbuds for several weeks now, and they're as good as any pair I have. And I have several. They connect without issue and have good, clear sound. If you're looking for the intricasies of fine tuning, how good is the base and all that, I'm not the gal for you. However, I think music sounds great, and they're perfect for listening to YouTube vids on my computer and audio books on my phone. The app is interesting. At first I thought I could talk directly to my buds. "Hey, Skullcandy!" (First earbuds I've had with voice control.) But you have to use the app for that feature. Not quite as convenient in my opinion, although perhaps I was expecting too much. The controls are not touch, but require clicking on the individual buds to control them. You can also control them through the app, though. Instructions are clear and easy to understand. I was up and running in minutes. All in all, I think they are excellent and definitely worth the price tag.

The case itself is nice 'pleather', good zipper and nicely appointed swivel snap to attach it to whatever you want to hang it on. My wife chose the natural leather color to go with one particular purse. She hangs it on the outside of the purse, like a 'bling' effect. Looks great. Good purchase. Five stars.

reviews.title: Best for DVDs and Inserts - HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
reviews.text: I've tried a few of these DVD albums, and this is best of the rest. The insert section is roomy enough so you only have to fold along one line and it will slide in comfortably  thus you can see the front and title edge. With Bellagio, you have to double fold, and it creases your insert more than you might want, especially if you think someday you might resell them -- messes with the aesthetics. As far as room, I can slip in 2 inserts, moving one up and under the blank space above and keeping the other low, so able to utilize every slot without feeling like I'm cheating myself by not having both inserts. In addition, for those annoying 3 disc DVDs/BluRay sets, you can slide one of the discs in with the insert, and it will be safe there. It's a sturdy product. I've been using my 240 count for 3 years now, and just bought a 120 in June. The 240 has held up very nicely, and I expect the same of the 120. If you have a large collection you want to transfer, you might want to do some planning ahead of time on how you want group your DVDs, because once you have packed your album, it is difficult to move pages around to reorganize. I had to remove my DVD and inserts. As long as it's not packed, you can manage. The metal clip is very strong and it's a firm hold, but when the slots are full, the bulk of it slides all the pages out because the pages are slick. I didn't have help to hold them in place, and you're going to need it. Leave a few empty in your groupings for new DVDs. The pages themselves are a good quality plastic and soft backing to avoid scratching. It's nicely balanced. I would recommend the 120 more than the 240 because it's easier to carry and store when full but as I said, my 240 has held up very nicely in 3 years. It is currently about 16# full. I don't carry the 240 by the handle. Don't want to push my luck. I can find no damage or weakening in it and every single original page is double packed with CDs  & Inserts, plus, I swiped a few pages from the 120 to put into the 240.  The downside is, if the pages ever do start to rip or tear, you can't find refills -- I've looked.  I have no hesitation in recommending this to anyone wanting to get away from cases and consolidate your DVD collection.  I just haven't found anything else I'm happy with.

Each outlet has wide space between each other and my chargers can plug in tightly and stable. There is also a flash LED light at the bottom which helps me to find it easily in the darkness. features: Compatibility: This AirPod Case compatible with AirPods 2 2019 and Airpod 1 2018.
Cute Rabbit Ear Design: Super fashion and cute plush protective case makes your Airpods case look more fashionable and unique.
Material: Carefully selected upgraded PC shell and faux fur cover, anti-static, anti fingerprint, farewell to dust.
Protection: Comprehensive protection, anti-seismic and anti falling, effective care for airpods case; do not scratch your Airpods.

Comfortable Hand Feeling: Comfortable touch, easy to hold, comfortable, use high-quality artificial wool, warm your hands. Comes with an metal anti-lost Carabiner clip, making it convenient and secure to carry your AirPods anywhere.

reviews.title: The hook doesn't remain closed
reviews.text: The hook doesn't remain closed... reordered new one same issue ..just returning item in total ..

reviews.title: Almost lost my AirPods because of this case.
reviews.text:
Had my AirPods attached to my phone case until it wasn’t.
On the first day I tried this case out on my phone, I almost lost my AirPods. I was Christmas shopping and had my phone in my back pocket the entire time. When I got home I noticed my AirPods wasn’t attached to my phone. So, I hopelessly went back to the first store I was at and there they were, on the parking lot floor! Thankfully no one had seen them! So no thanks to this case I have my AirPods.

reviews.title: All it needs is a hole for a clip and it would be perfect
reviews.text: I just like to attach my airpod covers to the case so it makes it inflexible when it doesn't offer a hole on the side to put a clip or keychain thru. Super cute tho!

title: Billboard Bluetooth Wireless Folding Headphones With Enhanced Bass, Controls, and Microphone - Black
description: These Bluetooth enabled wireless headphones syncs easily and quickly to your smartphone or tablet. A charging cable is included for fast charging. The convenient wireless feature allows you to move freely without being restricted by wires. Listen to music from any room up to 33 feet away. These headphones fold in for easy storage and travel.
features: The convenient wireless feature allows you to move from room to room without carrying your device with you while still being able to hear your music, with a range of up to 33 feet away. A 3.5mm audio cable is included with this item when you want to listen to music but don't want to use the Bluetooth function. Is ideal for outdoor use such as running as exercising.
These earbuds have a charging time of 2.5 hours and provide up to 6 hours of music and talk time. Easily answer and end calls thanks to the built in mic and controls.
Never miss a call because you can't hear over the music. Thanks to the built in mic, you can answer and end calls right from the headphones.

The headphones can be folded up when not in use which makes them ideal for storage or for travel when every bit of extra space counts. This feature also prevents the headphones from accidentally getting damaged in your bag.
